# GLKViewDrawableStencilFormat.format8

**Case**

An 8-bit stencil entry for each pixel.

## Declaration

```swift
case format8
```

## Constants

- **GLKViewDrawableStencilFormat.formatNone**: The underlying framebuffer object has no stencil buffer.
